title: theobroma cacao subsp. leiocarpum
intro: Theobroma cacao subsp. leiocarpum, also known as the white cacao, is a plant species within the cacao family that is native to the Amazon rainforest in South America. The medicinal properties of theobroma cacao subsp. leiocarpum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming theobroma cacao subsp. leiocarpum include reducing inflammation, improving mood, and providing antioxidant properties, which may help protect against certain diseases. Herbal preparations of theobroma cacao subsp. leiocarpum include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
